title: Wire up Discord trigger patterns in CLAUDE.md

log.context: Wire up Discord trigger patterns in CLAUDE.md

The "Discord Trigger Patterns" section has been inserted into `/mnt/data/CLAUDE.md` immediately before the "On-Restart Checklist" section. It documents both trigger patterns:

- `[congress] <topic>` — fires a `CongressWorkflow` via Temporal with the full Python snippet and the expected reply text
- `[persona-name] <question>` — looks up persona files under `bigclungus-meta/agents/active/` or `agents/fired/`, invokes via `claude -p`, and replies with the formatted response; includes the full know...(truncated)
